description_long: This object is a large, double-bladed weapon with an aggressive, fantasy-inspired design. The blades curve outward from a central grip, each ending in a sharp, hooked point, and feature jagged, serrated inner edges. The metal appears weathered with a dark, metallic sheen and subtle greenish-gold highlights along the edges, suggesting a forged or ancient look. The central handle is short and reinforced, likely made for two-handed use, and is visually integrated into the blade structure without a distinct crossguard. The overall silhouette is symmetrical, with both blades mirroring each other in size and curvature. There are no visible engravings, inlays, or decorative elements, giving the weapon a utilitarian yet menacing appearance.
description: A large, double-bladed, fantasy-style weapon with curved, hooked blades and a short central handle, finished in dark metal with greenish-gold highlights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full symmetrical spread of the double blades and the central handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blades and the handle, emphasizing the weapon's flatness.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the mirrored blade structure and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim, flat profile of the weapon.
attribute_handle_design: short, integrated, metallic, no visible wrapping or ergonomic features
